title: Request a drug for a public or military health emergency through the Special Access Program - Canada.ca
content:
## Request a drug for a public or military health emergency through the Special Access Program
If you're a public health official responsible for public or military health emergency preparedness and response within a Canadian jurisdiction, you may request access to drugs that are not authorized for sale in Canada. Your request must be for:
- using in an immediate public or military health emergency, incident or event or
- stockpiling in anticipation of a public or military health emergency, incident or event
For form and the guidance document, please contact SAP directly.
Access to SAP is available 24 hours a day, 365 days a year.
Regular business hours are from 8:30 am to 4:30 pm Eastern Standard Time, Monday to Friday.
Special Access Program Pharmaceutical Drugs Directorate Telephone: 613-941-2108 Fax: 613-941-3194 Email: sapd-pasm@hc-sc.gc.ca
